common.openGraphTitle: Dexter — autonomous AI agent for financial research
common.openGraphDescription: Dexter decomposes complex questions, fetches live market data, validates its own work, and produces citation-backed answers.

hero.title: Deep financial research,
hero.subtitle: Dexter decomposes complex questions, fetches live market data, validates its own work, and produces citation-backed answers. The same agent core powers the terminal CLI, WhatsApp, and the web — wherever you do research.

reasoning.title: Plans, executes, self-validates
reasoning.body: Dexter breaks down a question into a research plan, runs tools concurrently, and revisits its own answer until it is grounded in real data.

liveData.title: Direct market & filings access
liveData.body: Real-time prices, fundamentals, ratios and news through Financial Datasets, plus web search and document tooling — no stale snapshots.

memory.title: Remembers your thesis
memory.body: Long-term memory is held in MemoryLake. Dexter recalls your prior positions, preferences, and rules every turn so the analysis stays personal.

samples.title: Ask anything you would ask a junior analyst.
samples.quickDcf: Run a quick DCF on NVDA using the latest 10-Q.
samples.comparable: Compare AAPL and MSFT cash flow trends over the last 5 years.
samples.macro: What does the latest CPI print mean for the 10Y?
samples.thesis: Summarize the bull and bear thesis for TSMC right now.

composer.footer: DEXTER · For research only — not investment advice.

empty.title: What would you like to research?
empty.subtitle: Ask anything you would hand to a junior analyst. Dexter plans, fetches live data, and shows its work.

quickDcf.label: Quick DCF
quickDcf.prompt: Run a quick DCF on NVDA using the latest 10-Q. Show me your assumptions.

comparable.label: Comparable
comparable.prompt: Compare AAPL and MSFT cash flow trends over the last 5 years.

macro.label: Macro
macro.prompt: What does the latest CPI print mean for the 10-year Treasury yield?

thesis.label: Thesis
thesis.prompt: Summarize the current bull and bear thesis for TSMC.
